tts_lines.context: Player approaches northern forest edge — raptor pack territory
tts_lines.text: Stay low. Do not move. The pack leader is circling — if it sees you run, the others will follow. Wait for it to pass the ridge, then move west along the creek bed. The water will hide your scent. Go now, quietly.
tts_lines.gameplay_function: Teaches player raptor evasion — water scent masking mechanic

tts_lines.context: Player approaches NPC_ElderKael_001 at hub campfire
tts_lines.text: The old ones say this valley was different once. Before the great lizards came down from the northern hills. We built our fires here, we dried our meat here. Now we move camp every four days. You want to reclaim this ground? Then you must learn their patterns — when they feed, when they sleep, where they drink. Knowledge is the only weapon that does not break.
tts_lines.gameplay_function: Introduces dinosaur pattern-learning mechanic — feeding/sleeping/drinking schedules
